
---
title: "Anel Kaliyeva"
image: photo.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/anel-kaliyeva"
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:youremail@gmail.com"
---

One sentence about who you are and what you do.
Something like: "PhD candidate in [field] with expertise 
in X and Y, looking to apply my skills in [industry]."

## About me

Two or three sentences. Focus on what you bring to 
a company, not your academic achievements. Mention 
your PhD briefly as credibility, not as the main story.

## Skills

- Python, R, SQL
- Machine learning, statistical modelling
- Data visualization
- [Add your real skills here]
